title: WalletClient trait enables CI-testable payment logic — do not remove
description: payment.rs defines a WalletClient trait with latest_height + broadcast_tx, implemented by LightwalletdClient and MockClient in tests. This is what makes the sync_lag, no_spendable_notes, broadcast_failure, and happy_path tests runnable in CI without a live lightwalletd node. A contributor may suggest inlining LightwalletdClient calls directly to reduce abstraction. Do not do that — removing the trait collapses the test suite to network-dependent tests that cannot run in CI.
